positive: A stylized, minimalistic depiction of a forest biome at twilight. The scene features silhouetted, stylized deer gracefully leaping over glowing, oversized bioluminescent mushrooms. The background includes clean, abstract mountain ranges rendered in deep indigo and teal gradients. The aesthetic is highly graphic and stylized, resembling negative-space woodcut art combined with vaporwave geometry. Focus on strong contrast between the bright, ethereal glows and the deep, dark silhouettes. Use limited, harmonious color palette: midnight blue, deep emerald green, and luminous aqua for the accents. Central, symmetrical composition, perfect for a t-shirt print. Crisp lines, flat graphic style, vector art quality.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, blur, blurry, artifacts, grainy, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, cartoon, photorealism, complex scene, painting
